en.tool.description: As a last resort, execute a Windows command. Use only when no other appropriate tool (e.g., MCP) is available.
en.tool.system_prompt: This tool is a LAST RESORT. Use only if no other appropriate tool is available.

ja.tool.description: （日本語）As a last resort, execute a Windows command. Use only when no other appropriate ツール (例:, MCP) is available.
ja.tool.system_prompt: （日本語）This ツール is a LAST RESORT. Use only if no other appropriate ツール is available.
